title: Spice of Life - Carrot Edition - Unofficial 1.7.10
description: Unofficial Fork of The Spice Of Life with features backported from Spice of Life: Carrot Edition
body:
Unofficial Fork of [The Spice Of Life](https://github.com/squeek502/SpiceOfLife) by Squeek502 with features backported from [Spice of Life: Carrot Edition](https://github.com/Cazsius/Spice-of-Life-Carrot-Edition) by Cazsius

 

A mod that encourages dietary variety through diminishing returns, and dietary exploration by rewarding eating new foods.

 

Features: 

* Bonus heart for every 50 haunches of food eaten

* Diminishing returns for food eaten recently

* Tooltip indicator of foods that haven't been eaten yet, foods that have been eaten, and foods eaten recently contributing to diminishing returns

 

 

Credits

Thanks to Squeek502 for the original release of Spice of Life for 1.7.10, and to lordcazsius for the inspiration (and code from 1.12+) for the carrot edition!

 

Requires [AppleCore Unofficial](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/AppleCore/releases)
